heading: Definitions
label: 1386 Definitions
text: For the purposes of this subchapter the term “Philippine Government” shall mean “Government of the Commonwealth of the Philippines” until the date of independence, and thereafter it shall mean the “Government of the Republic of the Philippines”.
notes: References in TextDate of independence, referred to in text, was as recognized by 1946 Proc. No. 2695, eff. , set out as a note under .July 4, 1946July 4, 1946section 1394 of this title
